seoTitle: Sun Valley vs Sunny Corner — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sun Valley and Sunny Corner. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sun Valley vs Sunny Corner: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sun Valley and Sunny Corner.
heading: Sun Valley vs Sunny Corner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sun Valley, New South Wales and Sunny Corner, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunny Corner has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Sun Valley (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sun Valley or Sunny Corner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sun Valley has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Sunny Corner scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sun Valley scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Sunny Corner scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sun Valley or Sunny Corner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunny Corner has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
